workload_identity_pool_id.description: The ID to use for the pool, which becomes the final component of the resource name. This value should be 4-32 characters, and may contain the characters [a-z0-9-]. The prefix `gcp-` is reserved for use by Google, and may not be specified.

workload_identity_pool_namespace_id.description: The ID to use for the namespace. This value must: * contain at most 63 characters * contain only lowercase alphanumeric characters or `-` * start with an alphanumeric character * end with an alphanumeric character The prefix `gcp-` will be reserved for future uses.

workload_identity_pool_managed_identity_.description: The ID to use for the managed identity. This value must: * contain at most 63 characters * contain only lowercase alphanumeric characters or `-` * start with an alphanumeric character * end with an alphanumeric character The prefix `gcp-` will be reserved for future uses.

description.description: A description of the managed identity. Cannot exceed 256 characters.

disabled.description: Whether the managed identity is disabled. If disabled, credentials may no longer be issued for the identity, however existing credentials will still be accepted until they expire.

attestation_rules.description: Defines which workloads can receive an identity within a pool. When an AttestationRule is defined under a managed identity, matching workloads may receive that identity. A maximum of 50 AttestationRules can be set. Structure is [documented below](#nested_attestation_rules).

google_cloud_resource.description: A single workload operating on Google Cloud. For example: `//compute.googleapis.com/projects/123/uid/zones/us-central1-a/instances/12345678`.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
